[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] '''Missile destroyers''' were aquatic anti-air [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used to patrol waterways around Confederate installations. These craft were very effective at destroying enemy aircraft such as the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAAT]], however lacking any ground based defensive weaponry, these craft would require escort from [[Scout (Confederacy)|Confederate Scouts]]. The Missile Destroyer was later succeeded by the '''Heavy Missile Destroyer'''.

{{Veh-stub}}
